00020 
00021 package jelatine;
00022 
00023 import java.lang.Runnable;
00024 
00032 public final class VMFinalizer implements Runnable
00033 {
00038     public native static VMFinalizer getNextObject();
00039 
00043     public void run()
00044     {
00045         VMFinalizer o;
00046 
00047         while (true) {
00048             // The finalizer thread never quits by itself, when execution stops
00049             // it is terminated abruptly
00050             try
00051             {
00052                 // The next call will block until a new finalizable object is
00053                 // available
00054                 o = VMFinalizer.getNextObject();
00055                 o.finalize();
00056             }
00057             catch (Exception e)
00058             {
00059                 ; // A finalizer threw an exception, we ignore it
00060             }
00061         }
00062     }
00063 
00065     public void finalize()
00066     {
00067         ; /* HACK: this method is empty as it will not be really called */
00068     }
00069 }
Generated on Mon Mar 14 2016 15:25:25 for @PACKAGE_NAME@ by  1.7.1
